summary: Plan-only live PR inventory shard. All five hydrated targets are open pull requests with no shared canonical, no security-sensitive signal, and no close/merge/fix permission in this job; each is classified independently for normal maintainer or author follow-up outside this cluster.

actions.reason: This is a small, apparently reviewable i18n PR, but technical and translation-quality judgment belongs to normal maintainer review rather than this inventory cleanup cluster.
Failing proof/checks block merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout, but they do not justify closing this focused PR as part of inventory cleanup.
This is active maintainer-scoped feature/fix work, not a duplicate or low-signal PR suitable for closeout in this inventory shard.
This docs PR is independently reviewable and not safely closable as duplicate or superseded from the hydrated inventory evidence.
This contributor PR contains useful code and is waiting on normal maintainer/author review, so it should not be closed or replaced by this inventory cleanup job.
